summary: Tested Reports page pie chart fix and core application flows. The main fix (adding by_payment_method to /api/reports/sales-summary) is verified working. All requested features tested and passing.
passed_tests: ✓ Backend API /api/reports/sales-summary returns by_payment_method field correctly
✓ Backend API /api/reports/sales-summary: total_sales=39, sales_count=1, by_payment_method.cash.amount=39
✓ Backend API /api/reports/top-products returns product data correctly
✓ Backend API /api/reports/inventory-summary returns inventory stats
✓ Backend API /api/auth/login works with admin/admin123
✓ Login flow: admin credentials work, redirects to /admin dashboard
✓ Reports Page (/admin/reports): Pie chart renders with payment method data
✓ Reports Page: Shows 'cash 100%' (现金 100%) in donut chart
✓ Reports Page: Bar charts render for top products (sales amount)
✓ Reports Page: Horizontal bar chart for top products (sold quantity)
✓ Reports Page: 4 Summary cards visible ($39.00 Total Sales, $0.00 Online, 1647 Inventory, $21718.00 Value)
✓ Reports Page: Top products table shows 1 product (苹果手机壳, qty 2, $39.00)
✓ Sales Page (/admin/sales): Search input, date filters working
✓ Sales Page: Order table shows 1 order ($39.00, Cash, Completed)
✓ Products Page (/admin/products): 10 products listed with pricing info
✓ Admin Sidebar Navigation: Stores, Products, Sales links working
✓ POS Page (/pos): Cashier selection (系统管理员) working
✓ POS Page: Store selection (3 stores available) working
✓ POS Page: Main interface loads with product list and category filters
✓ POS Page: Function buttons (F1-F11) visible at bottom

features_verified.reports_pie_chart: FIXED - Pie chart now renders with payment method data (cash 100%)
features_verified.reports_bar_charts: PASS - Both vertical and horizontal bar charts render correctly
features_verified.reports_summary_cards: PASS - All 4 summary cards show correct data
features_verified.reports_top_products_table: PASS - Table displays product sales data
features_verified.pos_page: PASS - Cashier login, store selection, product grid working

critical_code_review_comments: The fix in backend server.py line 1334-1348 correctly aggregates payment methods
Frontend ReportsPage.js correctly processes by_payment_method data (lines 38-43)
All features from the enhancement list are working correctly

success_rate.backend: 100% - All 4 reports endpoints tested and working

seed_data_creation: Used existing data: 1 sales order (SO20260313042013F725), 10 products, 3 stores
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 12 enhancement items completed. The Reports page pie chart fix (item 12) is verified working - backend now returns by_payment_method field and frontend correctly renders the donut chart showing 'cash 100%'. Core flows (login, admin navigation, POS, sales) all working correctly. Test data includes 1 sales order for $39.00 paid in cash.

bug_fix_verification.issue: Reports page pie chart was showing 'No Data' because backend /api/reports/sales-summary was missing by_payment_method field
